titel: Solidarity in Action": The President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, gathered support for the reconstruction of Ukraine in Gdansk.
html: European Commission News, Brussels, June 30, 2026. On June 25th, the President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, participated in the Ukraine Reconstruction Conference in Gdansk, which was jointly organized by Poland and...
tldr: European Union leaders have gathered support to help rebuild Ukraine after the war.
lattlast:
The President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, participated in a major meeting held in the city of Gdańsk. The purpose of the meeting was to encourage more countries and organizations to contribute to the reconstruction of Ukraine.

The meeting was organized by Poland, along with other partners. Through this meeting, they aimed to demonstrate a shared commitment to helping Ukrainians rebuild their homes, schools, and infrastructure after the devastation caused by the war.

The decision focuses on establishing strong cooperation to provide Ukraine with both financial and practical support. This is crucial to ensure that the country can recover in the long term.
